parameters.jsonBody:
={{
{
  model: "llama3.2",
  prompt:
    "You are generating realistic task records for a task management application.\n\n" +
    "Generate exactly " + $json.batchSize + " tasks.\n\n" +
    "Rules:\n" +
    "- Return one valid JSON object per line.\n" +
    "- Do not wrap in an array.\n" +
    "- No markdown.\n" +
    "- No explanations.\n" +
    "- title required\n" +
    "- status: OPEN, IN_PROGRESS, DONE, BLOCKED\n" +
    "- priority: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH\n" +
    "- dueDate: must be date only in exact format YYYY-MM-DD\n" +
    "-Do not include time, timezone, or ISO timestamp\n" +
"- Return one compact JSON object per line"+
"- Each line must start with { and end with }."+
"- Do not output [, ], commas between lines, or any explanatory text."+
"- Do not output partial objects."+
    "Batch: " + $json.batchNumber,
  stream: false
}
}}
